jp.title: 新しい地図、共演者からのほっこりタレコミに「仲悪いよ」と冗談 8年越し第2弾公開に喜び【バナ穴 BANA_ANA】
jp.description: 新しい地図の稲垣吾郎、草なぎ剛、香取慎吾が6月27日、都内で開催された映画『バナ穴 BANA_ANA』（※アンダーバーは穴の絵文字）公開記念特別イベントに、ファーストサマーウイカ、趣里、鄭亜美、小澤征悦、吹越満、山内ケンジ監督とともに出席。本作公開への思いを語った。

jp.title: 稲垣吾郎、草なぎ剛、香取慎吾、新しい地図の8年ぶり映画に感慨｜シネマトゥデイ
jp.description: 稲垣吾郎、草なぎ剛（なぎ＝弓へんに剪）、香取慎吾が27日、都内で行われた映画『バナ穴 BANA_ANA』公開記念特別イベントに登壇し、新しい地図の8年ぶりとなる新作完成に感慨深げな表情を見せた。

jp.title: ネタニヤフ氏「レバノン南部に駐留継続」 和平への枠組み合意後に
jp.description: 【イスタンブール=渡辺夏奈】イスラエルのネタニヤフ首相は26日、「（親イラン組織）ヒズボラが武装解除するまで（緩衝地帯を）維持する」と述べ、レバノン南部で軍の駐留を続ける考えを改めて示した。地元メディアが報じた。イスラエル、レバノンの両政府はこれに先立ち、米国の仲介の下で和平実現に向けた枠組み合意に署名した。ヒズボラを武装解除し、将来的にイスラエル軍が国境まで撤収

world.title: Don’t freeze, don’t sweat: what’s the healthiest AC setting for summer?
world.description: Doctors say the Israeli summer affects the body more than many realize, from dehydration and fatigue to sleep quality, blood pressure and concentration; recommended daytime setting is usually 24°-25°C (75°-77°F), but at night comfort matters most

world.title: The Cody Rhodes Era is Over in WWE After Sami Zayn Loss at Night of Champions
world.description: WWE desperately needed something fresh before SummerSlam and found it: The Cody Rhodes era ended at the hands of Sami Zayn at Night of Champions.

world.title: Dangote signs XCMG deal to double refinery capacity by 2029
world.description: Aliko Dangote has signed a major equipment deal with China's XCMG machinery manufacturer aimed at doubling the Dangote Petroleum Refinery's 650,000 barrel capacity by 2029.

world.title: Axian Energy secures $60 million MCB loan for Africa renewables
world.description: Hassanein Hiridjee's Axian Energy has secured a $60 million loan from MCB Group to fund its renewable energy expansion across multiple African markets.

world.title: T20 World Cup: England thrash New Zealand to charge into semi-finals
world.description: England's winning run at the T20 World Cup continues with a rampant nine-wicket victory over New Zealand in their final group game at The Oval.

world.title: Heatwave breaks records in Germany, Denmark and Czech Republic
world.description: An estimated 150 million people are now experiencing temperatures of over 35C across Europe.

world.title: US activates highest-level response to Ebola outbreak
world.description: WASHINGTON: US health authorities activated the highest level of response to the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo, while announcing the shipment of experimental treatments to the region. “Our assessment is that the risk to the US continues to remain low,” said Satish Pillai, who is leading the Ebola response at the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention,
